reviews.comment:
Usualmente suelo parar en YPF full,pero esta vez le di la oportunidad a este lugar,el baño tiene un olor horrible,tratan de "mantenerlo limpio" echando perfume,pero da asco entrar.
Con relación a los precios, súper inflados,me parece un aprovechamiento a la gente que viene cansada de viajes y viene con sed o hambre.
Incluso,una bolsa de hielo es carisima, realmente es mejor hacer unos quilómetros mas e ir a un YPF FULL,porque es caro,no es limpio  y es pequeño,no es como para sentarse a comer.

(Translated by Google)
I usually stop at YPF Full, but this time I gave this place a chance. The bathroom smells awful; they try to "keep it clean" by spraying perfume, but it's disgusting to go in.
As for the prices, they're ridiculously inflated. I think they're taking advantage of people who are tired from traveling and arrive thirsty or hungry.
Even a bag of ice is incredibly expensive. It's really better to drive a few more kilometers and go to a YPF Full because this one is expensive, unclean, and small—not a place to sit down and eat.

reviewReply.comment: Buenos noches estamos trabajando en los puntos marcados te invito a seguir visitandonos para   mejorar tu experiencia con nosotros y lograr alcanzar las 5 estrellas saludos
